Spending an hour on a trivial chore has further delayed the term project, and my stress remains high despite the small progress.

The trivial chore is 47% complete with less than an hour remaining, but my stress and sleep debt remain critical as the term project deadline approaches.
The trivial chore is now 49% complete after another half-hour, but my stress and sleep debt remain critical as the term project deadline approaches.
